activities.name: Upsert Coldharbour Rooms
activities.description: Updates the ColdHarbour.Rooms table from the Polestar DB. Polestar DB is a replication of the GRG database (CH reporting suite/DB)

properties.description: Gets the previous week data for Shifts and Paylines

activities.name: Set EndDateTime
activities.description:
Find the most recent Sunday and set the time to 23:59:59
Logic Below:
Get today's UTC date.
Calculate the day of the week (Sunday = 0, Monday = 1, ..., Saturday = 6).
Make that number negative.
Subtract that many days from today (this gives the most recent Sunday).
Set the time to 23:59:59 UTC.

activities.name: Set StartDateTime
activities.description:
Find the Monday six days before the most recent Sunday and set the time to 00:00:00.
Logic Below:
Get today's UTC date.
Calculate the day of the week.
Make that number negative.
Subtract that many days from today (this gives the most recent Sunday).
Subtract another 6 days (this gives the Monday before that Sunday).
Set the time to 00:00:00 UTC

Scheduled to trigger once at 10:15pm, Everyday
